title: Loud (Part 2)
speaker: Antwan Cronje
summary: In part 2 of the LOUD series, we explore what it means to be unapologetically vocal about our faith. God didn't call us to whisper — He called us to be loud about what He's done in our lives. This message challenges us to stop shrinking back and start declaring boldly.
quotes: Your silence is not humility — it's disobedience.
God didn't save you to whisper.
The world is loud about everything except Jesus. Be the Christ Exception.
questions: What's one area of your life where you've been quiet about your faith?
Who in your world needs to hear what God has done for you?
What would it look like to be 'loud' about Jesus this week — not obnoxious, but bold?
Is there a testimony you've been sitting on that someone else needs to hear?
prayer: Lord, give us boldness. Not the kind that performs — the kind that can't stay quiet. Let our lives be so marked by Your presence that silence is no longer an option. Make us loud for You. In Jesus' name, Amen.
